token_auth.description: Piwik/Matomo API auth token, sent as the token_auth query parameter. Never logged.

base_url.description: Piwik/Matomo instance base URL override for tests or proxies.

site_id.description: Matomo idSite; required for site-scoped analytics and detail streams.

period.description: Matomo reporting period (day, week, month, year, range) for analytics report streams.

date.description: Matomo reporting date or date range for analytics report streams.

custom_dimension_id.description: Matomo idDimension for the custom_dimensions_custom_dimension stream.

last_minutes.description: Lookback window, in minutes, for the live_counters stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
